title: Parisian Hustle
overview: The story hones in on Mia, a 25-year-old Parisian who works in a nail bar on Rue des Dames. Unbeknownst to her employer and in exchange for money, she arranges access, for some of the salon’s female clients, to sought-after parties attended by high-profile footballers…

trailers.title: RUE DES DAMES Bande Annonce (2023) Garance Marillier
